title: Proclamation No. 684, s. 1941
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 684

RESERVING FOR MILITARY PURPOSES SIX (6) PARCELS OF THE PRIVATE DOMAIN OF THE COMMONWEALTH OF THE PHILIPPINES, SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF GULANG-GULANG, MUNICIPALITY OF LUCENA, PROVINCE OF TAYABAS, ISLAND OF LUZON

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section sixty-four, paragraph (c) of Act Numbered Two thousand seven hundred eleven, as amended, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for military purposes, under the administration of the Chief of Staff, Philippine Army, the following parcels of the private domain of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, situated in the barrio of Gulang-gulang, municipality of Lucena, Province of Tayabas, Island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Swo-16805, to wit:

Lot No. 3210-A, Bsd-5201. — A parcel of land (lot No. 3210-A of the subdivision plan Bsd-5201, being a portion of lot No. 3210 of the cadastral survey of Lucena, G. L. R. O. Cad. Record No. 202), situated in the barrio of Gulan-gulang, municipality of Lucena, Province of Tayabas. Bounded on the NE. by provincial road; on the SE., by lot No. 3210-B of the subdivision plan; on the SW., by lot No. 3211 of plan Swo-14645; and on the NW., by lot No. 3227-A of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 72° 45′ W., 241.51 m., more or less, from B L. B. M. No. 8, Lucena Cad. No. 112, thence N. 75° 34 E., 161.37 m. to point “2”; thence S. 29° 08′ E., 46.11 m . to point “3”; thence S, 60° 49’ W., 166.89 m. to point “4”; thence; N. 22° 04′ W., 87.87 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of ten thousand eight hundred seventy-five square meters (10,875), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points “1” and “2″ are marked by old B. L. concrete monuments; and points “3” and “4”, by B. L. concrete monuments; bearings true; declination 0° 22′ E.; date of the original survey, July, 1916-Dec., 1917 and that of the subdivision survey, June 18,1936.

Lot No. 3224-A, Bsd-5201. —A parcel of land (lot No. 3224-A of the subdivision plan Bsd-5201, being a portion of lot No. 3224 of the cadastral survey of Lucena, G. L. R. O. Cad. Record No. 202), situated in the barrio of Gulang-gulang, municipality of Lucena, Province of Tayabas. Bounded on the NE. by lot No. 3227-A of the subdivision plan and lot No. 3211 of plan Swo-14645; on the SE., by lot No. 3211 of plan Swo-14645 and lot No. 3212; on the SW, by lots Nos. 3224-B, 4077-A and 4978-A of the subdivision plan; and on the NW., by lots Nos. 4977-A and 3227-A of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 72° 29′ W., 404.59 m., more or less, from B .L. B. M. No. 8, Lucena Cad. No. 112, thence N. 46° 35′ W., 117.88 m. to point “2”; thence N. 46° 35′ W., 121.74 m. to point “3”; thence N. 63° 23′ E., 245.29 m. to point “4”; thence S. 42° 40′ E„ 118.93 m. to point “5”; thence S. 50° 22′ W., 68.03 m. to point “6”; thence S. 21° 59′ E., 84.44 m. to point “7”; thence S. 23° 23′ E., 126.21 m. to point “8”; thence S. 37° 12′ W., 24.80 m. to point “9”; thence S. 32° 44′ W., 13.98 m. to point “10”; thence S. 35° 53′ E., 31.30 m. to point “11” ; thence S. 0° 37′ W., 19.72 m. to point “12”; thence S. 66° 14′ W., 46.59 m. to point “13”; thence S. 39° 37’ W., 22.72 m. to point “14”; thence S. 17° 05′ E., 6.27 m. to point “15”; thence S. 6° 39′ E., 24.01 m. to point “16”; thence S. 64° 30’ W., 92.82 m. to point “18”; thence N. 25° 20’ W., 229.39 m. to point “19”; thence N. 65° 39’ E., 86.86 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of eighty-four thousand five hundred twenty-nine square meters (84,529), more or 3227-A of the subdivision plan .Bsd-5201, being, a portion less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, point “7” is marked by old tree; points “11”, “13” and “16”, by old stakes; points “18” and “19”, by B. L. concrete monuments; and the rest, by old B. L. concrete monuments; bearings true; declination 0° 22′ E.; date of the original survey, July, 1916-December, 1917 and that of the subdivision survey, June 18, 1936.

Lot No. 3227-A, Bsd-5201. —A. parcel of land (lot No. 3227-A of the subdivision plan Bsd-5201, being a portion of lot No. 3227 of the cadastral survey of Lucena, G. L. R. O. Cad. Record No. 202), situated in the barrio of Gulang-gulang, municipality of Lucena, Province of Tayabas. Bounded on the N. by lot No. 3227-B of the subdivision plan; on the NE., by provincial road; on the SE., by lots Nos. 3210-A and 3224-A of the subdivision plan; on the SW., by lot No. 3224-A of the subdivision plan; and on the NW., by lots Nos. 3224-A and 3227-B of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 33° 42′ W., 134.18 m., more or less, from B. L. B. M. No. 8, Lucena Cad. No. 112, thence S. 75° 34′ W., 161.37 m. to point “2”; thence N. 23° 23′ W., 126.21 m. to point “3”; thence N. 21° 59′ W., 84.44 m. to point “4”; thence N. 50° 22′ E., 68.03 m. to point “5”; thence N. 42° 40′ W., 118.93 m. to point “ 6″; thence S. 63° 23′ W., 245.29 m. to point “7”; thence N. 13° 00’ E., 235.24 m. to point “8”; thence S. 82° 44′ E., 272.06 m. to point “9”; thence S. 0° 41′ E., 108.26 m. to point “10”; thence S. 3° 18′ E., 20.36 m. to point “11”; thence S. 29° 03’ E., 22.62 m. to point “12”; thence S. 36° 54′ E., 169.70 m. to point “13”; thence S. 28° 56′ E., 97.82 m. to point of beginning; containing an area of seventy-eight thousand six hundred forty-two square meters (78,642), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, point “3” is marked by old tree; point “8” nail on tree; point “9”, B. L. concrete monument; points “10,” “12”and “13”, by old stakes; and the rest, by old B. L. concrete monuments; bearings true; declination 0° 22′ E.; date of the original survey, July, 1916-December, 1917 and that of the subdivision survey, June 18, 1936.

Lot No. 4977-A, Bsd-5201. —A. parcel of land (lot No. 4977-A of the subdivision plan Bsd-5201, being a portion of lot No. 4977 of the cadastral survey of Lucena, G. L. R O. Cad. Record No. 202), situated in the barrio of Gulang-gulang, municipality of Lucena, Province of Tayabas. Bounded on the NE. and SE., by lot No. 3224-A of the subdivision plan; on the SW., by lot No. 4977-B of the subdivision plan; and on the NW., by lot No. 4978-A of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 72° 29′ W., 404.59 m., more or less, from B. L. B. M. No. 8, Lucena Cad. No. 112, thence S. 65° 39′ W., 86.86 m. to point “2”; thence N. 25° 20′ W., 98.59 m. to point “3”; thence N. 52° 10′ E., 45.19 m. to point “4”; thence S. 46° 35′ E., 117.88 m. to point of beginning; containing an area of six thousand nine hundred thirteen square meters (6,913), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points “1” and “4” are marked by old B. L. concrete monuments; and points “2” and “3”, by B. L. concrete monuments; bearings true; declination 0° 22′ E., date of the original survey, July, 1916-December, 1917 and that of the subdivision survey, June 18, 1936.

Lot No. 4978-A, Bsd-5201.—A parcel of land (lot No. 4978-A of the subdivision plan Bsd-5201, being a portion of lot No. 4978 of the cadastral survey of Lucena, G. L. R. O Cad. Record No. 202), situated in the barrio of Gulang-gulang, municipality of Lucena, Province of Tayabas. Bounded on the NE. by lot No. 3224-A of the subdivision plan; on the SE., by lot No. 4977-A of the subdivision plan; and on the SW., by lot No. 4978-B of the subdivision plan; Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 62° 54’ W., 628.94 m., more or less, from B. L. B. M. No. 8, Lucena Cad. No. 112, thence S. 46° 35′ E., 121.74 m. to point “2”; thence S. 52° 10’ W., 45.19 m. to point “3”; thence N. 25° 20′ W., 123.24 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of two thousand seven hundred nineteen square meters (2,719), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points “1” and “2” are marked by old B. L. concrete monuments; and point “3”, by B. L. concrete monument; bearings true; declination 0° 22′ E.; date of the original survey, July, 1916—December 1917 and that of the subdivision survey, June 18, 1936.

Lot No. 3211-A, Bsd-6745. —A parcel of land (lot No. 3211-A of the subdivision plan Bsd-6745, being a portion of Lot No. 3211 of the cadastral survey of Lucena, G. L. R. O. Cad. Record No. 202), situated in the barrio of Gulang-gulang, municipality of Lucena, Province of Tayabas. Bounded on the NE., by lot No. 3210-A of plan Bsd-5201; on the SE., by lot No. 5030; and on the SW. and NW., by lot No. 3224-A of plan Bsd-5201. Beginning,at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 72° 48′ W., 241.51 m., more or less, from B. L. B. M. No. 8, Lucena Cad. No. 112, thence S. 22° 04′ E., 87.87 m. to point “2”; thence S. 50° 06′ W., 111.23 m. to point “3”; thence N. 24° 04′ W., 10.91 m. to point “4”; thence N. 6° 39′ E., 24.01 m. to point “5”; thence N. 17° 05′ W., 6.27 m. to point “6”; thence N. 39° 07′ E., 22.72 m. to point “7”; thence N. 66° 14′ E., 46.59 m. to point “8”; thence N. 0° 37′ E., 19.72 m . to point “9”; thence N. 35° 53′ W., 31.30 m. to point “10”; thence N. 32° 44′ E., 13.98 m. to point “11”; thence N. 37° 12′ E., 24.80 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of five thousand one hundred eighty square meters (5,180), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points “4”, “7”, “9” and “11” are marked by old stakes; and on the rest, by old B. L. concrete monuments; bearings true; declination 0° 22’ E.; date of the original survey, July, 1916-December, 1917 and that of the subdivision survey, January 10, 1939.

NOTE.-This is equal to lot No. 5029 of Lucena Cad. No. 112, case No. 1.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this seventeenth day of February, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty-one, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the sixth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
